<file name="f:\AUDIRA-REMOT\apps\desktop\src\App.tsx" language="typescriptreact" >
<content>
import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Sidebar } from './components/layout/Sidebar';
import { Header } from './components/layout/Header';
import { CommandPalette } from './components/layout/CommandPalette';
import { MetricCards } from './components/dashboard/MetricCards';
import { SystemOverview } from './components/dashboard/SystemOverview';
import { Charts } from './components/dashboard/Charts';
import { RecentDevices } from './components/dashboard/RecentDevices';
import { RightSidebar } from './components/dashboard/RightSidebar';
import { Dashboard } from './pages/Dashboard';
import { LiveDevices } from './pages/LiveDevices';
import { DeviceDetailSidebar } from './components/live-devices/DeviceDetailSidebar';
import { DeviceControl } from './pages/DeviceControl';
import { RolesPermissions } from './pages/RolesPermissions';
import { ControlSidebarRight } from './components/device-control/ControlSidebarRight';
import { Groups } from './pages/Groups';
import { GroupsSidebarRight } from './components/groups/GroupsSidebarRight';
import { LoginPage } from './pages/LoginPage';
import { WorkflowStudio } from './pages/WorkflowStudio';
import { LogsPage } from './pages/LogsPage';
import { AnalyticsPage } from './pages/AnalyticsPage';
import { SettingsPage } from './pages/SettingsPage';
import { UsersPage } from './pages/UsersPage';
import { AIVisionPage } from './pages/AIVisionPage';
import { BillingPage } from './pages/BillingPage';
import { ApiKeysPage } from './pages/ApiKeysPage';
import { TenantsPage } from './pages/TenantsPage';
import { UploadCenterPage } from './pages/UploadCenterPage';
import { NotificationsPage } from './pages/NotificationsPage';
import { PluginStorePage } from './pages/PluginStorePage';
import { AutomationManager } from './pages/AutomationManager';
import { ProxyManager } from './pages/ProxyManager';
import { HealthMonitor } from './pages/HealthMonitor';
import { AppRepository } from './pages/AppRepository';
import { ThemeProvider } from './hooks/useTheme';
import { ErrorBoundary } from './components/ErrorBoundary';
import { ToastContainer } from './components/ToastContainer';
import { OnboardingWizard } from './components/OnboardingWizard';
import { AIAssistant } from './components/AIAssistant';
import { SplashScreen } from './components/SplashScreen';
import { useAuthStore, useAppStore } from './store';
import { useDeviceDetection } from './hooks/useDeviceDetection';
import { useKeyboardShortcuts } from './hooks/useKeyboardShortcuts';

const ComingSoon = ({ title }: { title: string }) => (
  <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12">
    <div className="text-center">
      <div className="inline-block px-4 py-1.5 mb-4 text-[10px] font-black tracking-widest uppercase" style={{ border: '2px solid var(--primary)', color: 'var(--primary)' }}>
        Coming Soon
      </div>
      <h2 className="text-4xl font-black tracking-tighter mb-2" style={{ color: 'var(--foreground)' }}>{title}</h2>
      <p className="text-sm" style={{ color: 'var(--muted)' }}>This module is under active development.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
);

function AppContent() {
  const { isAuthenticated, logout } = useAuthStore();
  const { currentPage, navigate, isCommandPaletteOpen, setCommandPaletteOpen, toggleCommandPalette, orientation, setOrientation } = useAppStore();
  const [selectedDeviceId, setSelectedDeviceId] = React.useState<string | null>(null);
  const [showOnboarding, setShowOnboarding] = React.useState(false);

  // Auto-detect devices and show notifications
  useDeviceDetection(isAuthenticated);

  // Global keyboard shortcuts
  useKeyboardShortcuts();

  // Check if first time user
  useEffect(() => {
    if (isAuthenticated && !localStorage.getItem('audira-onboarded')) {
      setShowOnboarding(true);
    }
  }, [isAuthenticated]);

  useEffect(() => {
    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
      if ((e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey) && e.key === 'k') {
        e.preventDefault();
        toggleCommandPalette();
      }
    };

    // Listen for auth expiry
    const handleAuthExpired = () => {
      logout();
    };
    window.addEventListener('auth:expired', handleAuthExpired);
    window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
    return () => {
      window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);
      window.removeEventListener('auth:expired', handleAuthExpired);
    };
  }, [toggleCommandPalette, logout]);

  if (!isAuthenticated) {
    return <LoginPage onLogin={() => {}} />;
  }

  if (showOnboarding) {
    return (
      <OnboardingWizard
        onComplete={() => { localStorage.setItem('audira-onboarded', 'true'); setShowOnboarding(false); }}
        onSkip={() => { localStorage.setItem('audira-onboarded', 'true'); setShowOnboarding(false); }}
      />
    );
  }

  const renderPage = () => {
    switch (currentPage) {
      case 'dashboard':
        return <Dashboard />;
      case 'live-devices': return <LiveDevices selectedDeviceId={selectedDeviceId} onSelectDevice={setSelectedDeviceId} />;
      case 'device-control': return <DeviceControl deviceId={selectedDeviceId || ''} orientation={orientation} setOrientation={setOrientation} onBack={() => navigate('live-devices')} />;
      case 'roles-permissions': return <RolesPermissions />;
      case 'groups': return <Groups />;
      case 'workflow-studio': return <WorkflowStudio />;
      case 'automation': return <AutomationManager />;
      case 'proxy-manager': return <ProxyManager />;
      case 'health-monitor': return <HealthMonitor />;
      case 'app-repo': return <AppRepository />;
      case 'analytics': return <AnalyticsPage />;
      case 'logs': return <LogsPage />;
      case 'notifications': return <NotificationsPage />;
      case 'settings': return <SettingsPage />;
      case 'users': case 'roles': return <UsersPage />;
      case 'ai-vision': return <AIVisionPage />;
      case 'billing': return <BillingPage />;
      case 'api-keys': return <ApiKeysPage />;
      case 'tenants': return <TenantsPage />;
      case 'uploads': return <UploadCenterPage />;
      case 'plugins': return <PluginStorePage />;
      default: return <ComingSoon title={currentPage} />;
    }
  };

  const renderRightPanel = () => {
    switch (currentPage) {
      case 'live-devices': return <DeviceDetailSidebar deviceId={selectedDeviceId} onInteractiveMode={() => navigate('device-control')} />;
      case 'device-control': return <ControlSidebarRight deviceId={selectedDeviceId || ''} orientation={orientation} setOrientation={setOrientation} />;
      case 'groups': return <GroupsSidebarRight />;
      default: return null;
    }
  };

  return (
    <div className="flex h-screen overflow-hidden" style={{ background: 'var(--background)' }}>
      <Sidebar onNavigate={navigate} currentPage={currentPage} />
      <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col min-w-0">
        <Header />
        <div className="flex-1 flex overflow-hidden">
          <div className="flex-1 flex flex-col overflow-hidden">
            {renderPage()}
          </div>
          {renderRightPanel()}
        </div>
      </div>
      
      <CommandPalette 
        isOpen={isCommandPaletteOpen} 
        onClose={() => setCommandPaletteOpen(false)} 
        onNavigate={navigate} 
      />
      <AIAssistant deviceId={selectedDeviceId} />
    </div>
  );
}

function App() {
  const [showSplash, setShowSplash] = React.useState(true);

  if (showSplash) {
    return <SplashScreen onComplete={() => setShowSplash(false)} />;
  }

  return (
    <ThemeProvider>
      <ErrorBoundary>
        <AppContent />
        <ToastContainer />
      </ErrorBoundary>
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}

export default App;


</content>
</file>

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-REMOT\services\api-gateway\main.go" language="go" >
<content>
package main

import (
	"log"
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httputil"
	"net/url"
	"os"
	"strings"
	"time"

	"github.com/gin-contrib/cors"
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

type ServiceConfig struct {
	Name    string
	URL     string
	Prefix  string
}

func createReverseProxy(target string) gin.HandlerFunc {
	return func(c *gin.Context) {
		remote, err := url.Parse(target)
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadGateway, gin.H{"error": "Service unavailable"})
			return
		}

		proxy := httputil.NewSingleHostReverseProxy(remote)
		proxy.ErrorHandler = func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, err error) {
			log.Printf("[GATEWAY] Proxy error for %s: %v", target, err)
			w.WriteHeader(http.StatusBadGateway)
			w.Write([]byte(`{"error":"Service temporarily unavailable"}`))
		}

		c.Request.Host = remote.Host
		proxy.ServeHTTP(c.Writer, c.Request)
	}
}

func main() {
	gin.SetMode(gin.ReleaseMode)

	authURL := os.Getenv("AUTH_SERVICE_URL")
	if authURL == "" {
		authURL = "http://localhost:8080"
	}

	deviceURL := os.Getenv("DEVICE_SERVICE_URL")
	if deviceURL == "" {
		deviceURL = "http://localhost:9099"
	}

	workflowURL := os.Getenv("WORKFLOW_SERVICE_URL")
	if workflowURL == "" {
		workflowURL = "http://localhost:8083"
	}

	notificationURL := os.Getenv("NOTIFICATION_SERVICE_URL")
	if notificationURL == "" {
		notificationURL = "http://localhost:8082"
	}

	streamURL := os.Getenv("STREAM_SERVICE_URL")
	if streamURL == "" {
		streamURL = "http://localhost:8084"
	}

	ocrURL := os.Getenv("OCR_SERVICE_URL")
	if ocrURL == "" {
		ocrURL = "http://localhost:8085"
	}

	billingURL := os.Getenv("BILLING_SERVICE_URL")
	if billingURL == "" {
		billingURL = "http://localhost:8086"
	}

	services := []ServiceConfig{
		{Name: "auth", URL: authURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/auth"},
		{Name: "users", URL: authURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/users"},
		{Name: "devices", URL: deviceURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/devices"},
		{Name: "cloud", URL: deviceURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/cloud"},
		{Name: "groups", URL: deviceURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/groups"},
		{Name: "webhooks", URL: deviceURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/webhooks"},
		{Name: "audit", URL: deviceURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/audit"},
		{Name: "export", URL: deviceURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/export"},
		{Name: "recordings", URL: deviceURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/recordings"},
		{Name: "crashes", URL: deviceURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/crashes"},
		{Name: "workflows", URL: workflowURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/workflows"},
		{Name: "automation", URL: workflowURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/automation"},
		{Name: "notifications", URL: notificationURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/notifications"},
		{Name: "email", URL: notificationURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/email"},
		{Name: "stream", URL: streamURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/stream"},
		{Name: "stream-ws", URL: streamURL, Prefix: "/ws"},
		{Name: "rtc", URL: streamURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/rtc"},
		{Name: "ocr", URL: ocrURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/ocr"},
		{Name: "billing", URL: billingURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/billing"},
		{Name: "logs", URL: deviceURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/logs"},
		{Name: "roles", URL: deviceURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/roles"},
		{Name: "tenants", URL: deviceURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/tenants"},
		{Name: "settings", URL: deviceURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/settings"},
		{Name: "api-keys", URL: deviceURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/api-keys"},
		{Name: "uploads", URL: deviceURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/uploads"},
		{Name: "plugins", URL: deviceURL, Prefix: "/api/v1/plugins"},
	}

	r := gin.New()
	r.Use(gin.Recovery())

	// CORS
	allowedOrigins := os.Getenv("CORS_ORIGINS")
	if allowedOrigins == "" {
		allowedOrigins = "http://localhost:1420,http://localhost:5173,tauri://localhost"
	}

	r.Use(cors.New(cors.Config{
		AllowOrigins:     strings.Split(allowedOrigins, ","),
		AllowMethods:     []string{"GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"},
		AllowHeaders:     []string{"Content-Type", "Authorization"},
		AllowCredentials: true,
		MaxAge:           12 * time.Hour,
	}))

	// Health check
	r.GET("/health", func(c *gin.Context) {
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{
			"status":   "UP",
			"service":  "api-gateway",
			"services": len(services),
		})
	})

	// Route to services
	for _, svc := range services {
		log.Printf("[GATEWAY] Routing %s -> %s", svc.Prefix, svc.URL)
		r.Any(svc.Prefix+"/*path", createReverseProxy(svc.URL))
		r.Any(svc.Prefix, createReverseProxy(svc.URL))
	}

	port := os.Getenv("PORT")
	if port == "" {
		port = "9082"
	}

	log.Printf("[GATEWAY] API Gateway starting on :%s", port)
	log.Printf("[GATEWAY] Auth Service: %s", authURL)
	log.Printf("[GATEWAY] Device Service: %s", deviceURL)

	if err := http.ListenAndServe(":"+port, r); err != nil {
		log.Fatalf("Failed to start gateway: %v", err)
	}
}

</content>
</file>

<file name="f:\AUDIRA-REMOT\services\notification-service\main.go" language="go" >
<content>
package main

import (
	"database/sql"
	"log"
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"strings"
	"time"

	"github.com/gin-contrib/cors"
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	_ "github.com/lib/pq"
)

var db *sql.DB

func initDB() {
	connStr := os.Getenv("DB_URL")
	if connStr == "" {
		connStr = "postgres://audira:password@localhost:5432/audira_grid?sslmode=disable"
	}

	var err error
	db, err = sql.Open("postgres", connStr)
	if err != nil {
		log.Fatalf("[NOTIFICATION DB] Connection failed: %v", err)
	}

	_, err = db.Exec(`
		CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS notifications (
			id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
			tenant_id INTEGER,
			user_id INTEGER,
			title TEXT NOT NULL,
			message TEXT NOT NULL,
			type TEXT DEFAULT 'info',
			is_read BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
			metadata JSONB,
			created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
		);
	`)
	if err != nil {
		log.Printf("[NOTIFICATION DB] Migration error: %v", err)
	}

	// Seed sample notifications
	var count int
	db.QueryRow("SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notifications").Scan(&count)
	if count == 0 {
		db.Exec("INSERT INTO notifications (tenant_id, user_id, title, message, type) VALUES (1, 1, 'Welcome to Audira Grid', 'Your account has been set up successfully.', 'success')")
		db.Exec("INSERT INTO notifications (tenant_id, user_id, title, message, type) VALUES (1, 1, 'Device Connected', 'Samsung Galaxy S21 is now online.', 'info')")
		db.Exec("INSERT INTO notifications (tenant_id, user_id, title, message, type) VALUES (1, 1, 'Workflow Completed', 'Batch test workflow finished with 98% success rate.', 'success')")
	}

	log.Println("[NOTIFICATION DB] Initialized")
}

func main() {
	initDB()
	gin.SetMode(gin.ReleaseMode)

	r := gin.New()
	r.Use(gin.Recovery())

	allowedOrigins := os.Getenv("CORS_ORIGINS")
	if allowedOrigins == "" {
		allowedOrigins = "http://localhost:1420,http://localhost:5173"
	}

	r.Use(cors.New(cors.Config{
		AllowOrigins:     strings.Split(allowedOrigins, ","),
		AllowMethods:     []string{"GET", "POST", "PUT", "DELETE", "OPTIONS"},
		AllowHeaders:     []string{"Content-Type", "Authorization"},
		AllowCredentials: true,
		MaxAge:           12 * time.Hour,
	}))

	r.GET("/health", func(c *gin.Context) {
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "UP", "service": "notification-service"})
	})

	r.GET("/api/v1/notifications", func(c *gin.Context) {
		rows, err := db.Query("SELECT id, title, message, type, is_read, created_at FROM notifications ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50")
		if err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": err.Error()})
			return
		}
		defer rows.Close()

		var notifications []map[string]interface{}
		for rows.Next() {
			var id int
			var title, message, nType string
			var isRead bool
			var createdAt time.Time
			rows.Scan(&id, &title, &message, &nType, &isRead, &createdAt)
			notifications = append(notifications, map[string]interface{}{
				"id": id, "title": title, "message": message,
				"type": nType, "isRead": isRead, "createdAt": createdAt,
			})
		}
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, notifications)
	})

	r.PUT("/api/v1/notifications/:id/read", func(c *gin.Context) {
		id := c.Param("id")
		db.Exec("UPDATE notifications SET is_read = TRUE WHERE id = $1", id)
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "ok"})
	})

	r.PUT("/api/v1/notifications/read-all", func(c *gin.Context) {
		db.Exec("UPDATE notifications SET is_read = TRUE")
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "ok"})
	})

	r.POST("/api/v1/notifications", func(c *gin.Context) {
		var input struct {
			Title   string `json:"title" binding:"required"`
			Message string `json:"message" binding:"required"`
			Type    string `json:"type"`
			UserID  int    `json:"userId"`
		}
		if err := c.ShouldBindJSON(&input); err != nil {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "Title and message required"})
			return
		}
		if input.Type == "" {
			input.Type = "info"
		}

		var id int
		db.QueryRow(
			"INSERT INTO notifications (tenant_id, user_id, title, message, type) VALUES (1, $1, $2, $3, $4) RETURNING id",
			input.UserID, input.Title, input.Message, input.Type,
		).Scan(&id)

		c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, gin.H{"id": id})
	})

	port := os.Getenv("PORT")
	if port == "" {
		port = "8082"
	}

	// Email service
	InitEmail()
	RegisterEmailRoutes(r)

	// Email logs table
	if db != nil {
		db.Exec(`
			CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS email_logs (
				id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
				recipients TEXT,
				subject TEXT,
				status TEXT DEFAULT 'sent',
				created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
			);
		`)
	}

	log.Printf("[NOTIFICATION] Service starting on :%s", port)
	if err := r.Run(":" + port); err != nil {
		log.Fatalf("Failed to start: %v", err)
	}
}
